title: Creamy Crispy Dutch Bread Bake
description: A nutty and creamy Dutch bread bake perfect for a monsoon evening, made with bread flour and low-fat ingredients
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, yeast, and baking soda.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, eggs, and softened butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes.
Place the dough in a greased Dutch oven, forming a round shape.
Mix together the chopped walnuts and dried raisins, and sprinkle on top of the dough.
Bake the bread for 25 minutes, then reduce heat to 375°F (190°C) and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes.
Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Broil the bread for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool completely on a wire rack.
Serve warm, cut into slices or wedges.
